visual_3d.notes: CoastBiome AAA lighting pass: 4-source setup (DirectionalLight sun + HemisphereLight + rim + ambient). flatShading on all materials. 40 trees (was 25) in 3 depth layers. Celtic conifer cones replace generic spheres. Fog warm breton 0x8a9a78 vs cold blue 0xaabbcc. Low-poly ocean with animated vertex displacement (wave facets). MerlinLairScene 5-source lighting (key/rim/fill/cauldron/ambient).

animation_fluidity.notes: Ocean vertices animated per-frame with flatShading wave facets. hitFlash already connected in mg_combat_rituel render(). pulsePhase continuous on center zone. No new regressions.

asset_density.notes: Trees: 25 → 40 (+60%). 3 depth layers (near/mid/far). Menhirs: 5 → 7 with moss patches. Rocks: 15 → 18 flat-shaded. MerlinLair: 3 extra shelves + moonlight + parchments already in place from T076.

gameplay_feel.notes: Combat rituel: timer bar now responsive (min(380px,100%)). ARIA labels explicit. hitFlash flash verified connected in render. Obstacle immutable updates (spread pattern maintained). Center bonus zone pulsing correctly.

narrative_immersion.notes: No narrative changes this cycle. 386 cards pool maintained. Breton/Celtic vocabulary present in card templates. Fog now atmospheric warm-grey matches narrative tone.

web_performance.notes: app.js: 120.38 KB (+1.48 KB for ocean vertex animation cache). Gzip: 37.62 KB. Total gzip: 195.74 KB (well under 600 KB limit). Build: 3.33s. TS: 0 errors. MerlinLairScene: 800 lines (at limit). computeVertexNormals per frame on ocean may cost ~0.5ms on mobile — acceptable for 30fps target.

effect_caps_compliance: PASS — no changes to CardSystem or EffectEngine this cycle

regression_check.gate_bundle: WARN (>1% delta but <5% hard limit — acceptable)

top5_fixes_applied: CoastBiome: 4-source AAA lighting (DirectionalLight sun + HemisphereLight + rim + ambient)
CoastBiome: flatShading on ALL materials (ground, ocean, trees, rocks, menhirs)
CoastBiome: 40 Celtic conifer trees in 3 depth layers (was 25 sphere-trees)
CoastBiome: fog warm breton 0x8a9a78 + low-poly ocean vertex wave animation
top3_remaining_cycle32: CoastBiome: CameraRail (CameraRail.ts) not yet wired to CoastBiome — forest walk should use this scene
MerlinLair: interactive zone hover animation missing (crystal should pulse, scroll should glow)
mg_combat_rituel: obstacle speed easing not progressive — difficulty curve should accelerate over 10s
